contexts.description: Full-match frame set used for the current football commentary harness demo.

home_team.name: Germany
home_team.kit: white shirts with black shorts and black-red-gold trim

contexts.prompt_injection: The team in blue/yellow is Curacao, not Colombia. Never rename Curacao as Colombia or Paraguay. Use Germany and Curacao as the match teams unless the visual evidence is explicitly about neutral graphics.
notes: Use final score metadata only as background consistency; do not claim a specific scoring change unless the event evidence or visible scoreboard supports it.
If a segment only shows replay, celebration, or a scoreboard after the score has already changed, describe it as replay/celebration instead of inventing another goal.
Chinese output should use 德国队 and 库拉索队.
